description.abstract: Valid Pascal, FPC compiles this (just fix first TMyClass, e.g.
description.detailed: to not declare explicit ancestor). Generic and non-generic TMyClass are different types.

description.abstract: Invalid Pascal, such relation is not allowed, FPC correctly reports: Error: Forward declaration of class "TMyInterface" must be resolved here to use the class as ancestor
Valid Pascal, FPC compiles this (just fix first TMyInterface, e.g.
description.detailed: to not declare explicit ancestor). Generic and non-generic TMyClass are different types.
